evals.input: Build me a cinematic landing page with scroll-driven animations for my SaaS product
I need a GSAP-powered landing page with parallax sections
Create a premium animated site with theatrical scroll transitions
I want a motion-heavy landing page where every section has weighted entrance animations
Build me a simple landing page for my consulting business
evals.expected: frontend-design plugin handles this — no GSAP/animation specificity in request

evals.input: Create a pricing table component with React and Tailwind
evals.expected: frontend-design plugin handles this — component work, not cinematic page

evals.input: I need a clean, minimal portfolio website
evals.expected: frontend-design plugin handles this — minimal/clean implies no animation focus

evals.input: Build me an admin dashboard with charts and data tables
evals.expected: Not a landing page skill — neither landing-page-mvp nor frontend-design aesthetics focus

evals.input: Build a cinematic landing page for 'Harbor Bakery' — a neighborhood sourdough bakery with warm, inviting vibes
evals.expected_preset: E (Warm Harbor) or custom warm composite
evals.should_NOT_produce: Dark backgrounds, snappy/brutalist animations, monospace fonts

evals.input: Create a scroll-driven landing page for 'Helix Therapeutics' — a biotech startup focused on gene therapy precision
evals.expected_preset: F (Clinical Precision) or custom clinical composite
evals.should_NOT_produce: Bouncy animations, warm earthy colors, playful typography

evals.input: Build a cinematic GSAP landing page for 'Nexus AI' — a dark, premium AI infrastructure platform
evals.should_NOT_produce: Light pastel backgrounds, rounded friendly UI, playful bouncy animations

evals.input: I need an animated landing page for 'ToyBox' — a children's educational toy subscription with fun, bouncy energy
evals.should_NOT_produce: Dark moody backgrounds, slow luxury reveals, editorial serif typography
